message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first wezterm lookups in MCP pane tools (tick 261)

Migrates 2 ambient `wezterm.get_pane` calls in `mcp_tools.rs` to the
cx-first sibling `get_pane_with_cx`. These are the MCP pane-state and
pane-capability tools that fetch WezTerm pane metadata.

**Sites (2):**

- L955 pane-state path: `wezterm.get_pane(params.pane_id)` →
  `get_pane_with_cx(&wezterm_cx, params.pane_id)`. Runs inside the
  pane-state tool after distributed-remote-pane lookup.
- L1788 pane-capability resolve path: same migration inside the
  block_on wrapper on a scratch StorageHandle.

Both sites call-time resolve cx via
`Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` — MCP tool handlers don't
thread Cx through their sync trait dispatch signatures, so this is the
correct pattern.

The `_with_cx` variant on WeztermInterface threads cx through the
MuxPool dispatch layer, enabling cx-cancel to propagate into the mux
RPC layer. Combined with tick 258's MCP storage sweep, the entire MCP
tool dispatch chain (storage + wezterm) is now cx-threaded end-to-end.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 75 (187-261).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 35 (runtime 7 + mcp 2 + tui 8 + web 4
+ mcp_helpers 2 + mcp_tools 10 + workflows/runner 1
+ workflows/account_steps 1).
main.rs cross-crate total: 127 sites (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
